title: Dashing Enchantment
description: This Datapack Adds a new enchantment called "Dash" Allowing you to perform a Dash!
body:
# Dashing Enchantment
### **[REQUIRED DEPENDENCY](https://modrinth.com/datapack/player_motion):** for ver- 2.1.3, 2.1.1 and below...

Sorry, but **no more updates will be coming out for this datapack**. I still want to thank you guys though, I cant believe we hit 1k downloads, as well as our downloads to like/follow ratio being more than most projects out there!

## **What this datapack/mod does?**

This datapack adds A **new Enchantment** called "Dash"! 
It allows the user to perform a Dash wherever they look...
___________________________________________________________

### **Important Info:**
### 
**Can be Put on-** Boots.

**Activate by-** Sprint Sneaking While off the Ground/Jumping.

**Incompatible With-** This enchantment cant be put on the same item if it has Feather Falling.

**Obtained By-** The enchantment can be obtained as a book through basic vaults in the Trial Chambers.

**Momentum Jump-** By Dashing at the ground at just the right Angle, you can put your momentum into a Bigger jump. (This mechanic isnt present in some versions).

**Requirements- (2.1.4 and above)** You have to have at least 3 Bars of hunger to Dash, and you also can only dash twice in the air before having to touching the ground again.

**Important Changes-** If you want to know how some more obscure things and mechanics work, check the changelog.

**Known Bugs-** Sometimes you will hear a sound and your screen will flash but thats it, its completely visual, so dont worry. (in newer/newest version(s), keep in mind older versions may have different or no bugs).

___________________________________________________________

### **Disclamer I Guess:**

Most of this home page will only be updated to have the info of **newer versions** only, this means most of the information will be incredibly incorrect and irrelevent in past versions. If you want to know changes and bugs in past versions, please check the changelog.

This pack is based on Strict Scoreboard timing, most free Hosting servers like Aternos will have a huge delay and sometimes **Broken** Momentum and Movement.
